ground_truth.title: Process and Control Today | OMRON Industrial Automation
ground_truth.main_content: OMRON Corporation is a global leader in the field of automation based on its core technology of 'Sensing & Control + Think'. OMRON's business fields cover a broad spectrum, ranging from industrial automation and electronic components to social systems, healthcare, and environmental solutions. Established in 1933, OMRON has about 29,000 employees worldwide, working to provide products and services in around 120 countries and regions. In the field of industrial automation, OMRON supports manufacturing innovation by providing advanced automation technology and products, as well as through extensive customer support, in order to help create a better society. OMRON has extensive lines of control components and equipment, ranging from image-processing sensors and other input devices to various controllers and output devices such as servo motors, as well as a range of safety devices and industrial robots. Products and Services include: Cage Rotor Induction Motors - Complete Systems, Closed Loop Flux Vector Inverters, Control Systems, Controllers Multi-Loop, Data Acquisition Systems, Drives, Encoders, Fibre Optic Systems, Industrial Electric Drives & Motors, Inverters, Level Measurement/Control, Limit Switches, Logic Controllers, Motion Controllers, Motor Drives, Operator Interfaces, Optical Sensors, Photoelectric Sensors, PLCs & Positioning Systems, Power Supplies, Programmable Controllers, Proximity Sensors, SCADA Software & Systems, Sensorless Flux Vector Inverters, Servo Drives & Motors, Shaft Encoders, Software, Speed & Position Sensing, Switches, Temperature Control, Terminal Blocks, Timers and many more industrial automation components and systems.
